hero.title: Six Ways To Make A Space Impactful
hero.description: Each discipline at Orenda is led by a single steward from first conversation to final delivery. We take on only eight commissions per year — never more.

stats.label: Commissions Completed
stats.text: Across private residences, boutique hotels and landmark buildings.

stats.label: Years of Practice
stats.text: Founded in 2014 by Elena Conti in Milan.

stats.label: Per Year Maximum
stats.text: We cap our work at eight — quality demands it.

disciplines.title: Spaces With Purpose
disciplines.description: Six design disciplines, one studio standard. From private villas to landmark buildings, each commission receives the same patient, unhurried craft — and a single designer who owns it entirely.

spotlight.title: Exceptional Work In Focus
spotlight.description: Four disciplines — each demanding a different kind of listening. Click to explore the one that fits your project.

tabs.label: Residential
tabs.panelExcerpt: A private home should surprise its owners every morning — not with novelty, but with the quiet rightness of a room designed for how they actually live.
features: Full-home commissions — one steward from concept to handover.
Material sourcing across our curated Italian & Nordic supplier network.
Bespoke furniture and joinery designed and built in our Milan atelier.
Seven-day site observation before any design decisions are made.

tabs.label: Hospitality
tabs.panelExcerpt: A great hotel room makes a guest want to stay rather than go out. We design for the quality of that pause — when someone stops checking their phone.
features: Boutique hotels, destination restaurants and members' clubs across Europe.
Brand-to-interior translation — ensuring the space fulfils the identity promise.
Acoustic planning and lighting choreography included in every commission.
Annual stewardship: we return to review and refine after year one.

tabs.label: Heritage
tabs.panelExcerpt: Half our commissions are restorations — buildings that have held a century of light and still ask for more. We preserve what should stay and introduce what must come.
features: Listed and Grade-I buildings restored with full heritage compliance.
Conservation-grade plasterwork, timber and stone sourced authentically.
Modern comfort integrated invisibly — no visible anachronisms.
Close collaboration with conservation architects and local authorities.

tabs.label: Commercial
tabs.panelTitle: Spaces That Say Something Before Anyone Speaks.
tabs.panelExcerpt: Galleries, showrooms and private offices where the environment is as deliberate as the work it houses — commercial interiors that communicate identity through atmosphere.
features: Gallery and exhibition environments are designed around artwork and flow.
Flagship showrooms and luxury retail with brand-aligned interior language.
Private offices and board rooms where space reflects the company's character.
Acoustic and lighting consultancy is included in every commercial brief.

whyOrenda.title: The Standard Behind Every Commission.
whyOrenda.description: Four commitments we make to every client — regardless of discipline, scale or location.

items.title: Ultra-Minimal
items.text: Every project has a single named designer who shepherds it from briefing through to the moment we hand you the keys.
items.label: Designer-to-project ratio

items.title: Action-Oriented
items.text: Before sketching a single concept, we spend a week observing your space—tracking its natural light and daily rhythm.
items.label: Days of site witnessing

items.title: In-House Atelier
items.text: Our Milan atelier produces custom furniture, joinery and lighting fixtures — designed by our team, built by our craftspeople.
items.label: Bespoke pieces made per year

items.title: Modern & Direct
items.text: We limit our studio to eight active commissions each year—not as a marketing tactic, but because quality demands it.
items.label: Client return rate
